name: Surging Neon
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: With shocking speed, [AttackerName] leaps at [TargetName] and captures [TargetHisOrHer] mouth in an electrifying kiss while wrapping her arms around [TargetHisOrHer] shoulders as [TargetHeOrShe] reels from the impact of her soft curves, the plush feeling pressing disarmingly against [TargetHisOrHer] chest, leaving her free to carry on with the thirsty makeout.
miss: With shocking speed, [AttackerName] leaps at [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to evade her!
